name: FDS: MCP Lookup Tool - Chain Link Fence

nodes.name: When Executed from MCP Trigger Call

parameters.name: sql
parameters.value: SELECT   sku,   family_code,   unit_name,   name,   price,   color,   height_ft,   height_in,   height_normal_in,   mesh_type,   pipe_diameter_in,   pipe_diameter_label,   length_ft,   wall_thickness,   material_grade,   end_type,   units_of_measure,   (     SELECT COUNT(*)     FROM Products_summary_active_description_family_code_name_price_sku_unit_code     WHERE family_code = 5       AND unit_name = 'Pipe'       AND color = 'Black'       AND pipe_diameter_label = '1-3/8"'       AND length_ft = 21       AND wall_thickness = 0.065       AND material_grade = 'Resi'       AND end_type = 'SE'       AND active = 1   ) AS total_count FROM Products_summary_active_description_family_code_name_price_sku_unit_code WHERE family_code = 5   AND unit_name = 'Pipe'   AND color = 'Black'   AND pipe_diameter_label = '1-3/8"'   AND length_ft = 21   AND wall_thickness = 0.065   AND material_grade = 'Resi'   AND end_type = 'SE'   AND active = 1 ORDER BY price DESC, unit_name, height_normal_in, color LIMIT 5;
